channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Bluetti says home solar power is now ‘plug-and-play’ — I went to the Balco launch to see if it’s really that simple
item.description: Has Bluetti cracked the biggest barrier to home solar power with its new 'plug-and-play' balcony systems?

item.title: US reportedly allows 10 Chinese companies to buy NVIDIA's coveted H200 AI chips
item.description: But Reuters says NVIDIA has yet to make any deliveries.

item.title: I tried the 'Goal, Tone, Rules' ChatGPT prompt and it fixed my awkward AI emails while also saving me hours a week
item.description: Giving ChatGPT clearer context and tone instructions makes it great at handling emails

item.title: Confidentiality is not security: Why the real AI runtime crisis Is the Authorization Gap
item.description: The real runtime crisis is the Authorization Gap — the absence of any enforcement point that decides what an AI identity is permitted to do at the moment it tries to act.

item.title: Microsoft is asking for your help to fix Windows 11 — and I'm hopeful this isn't just a desperate move
item.description: This is the clearest sign yet the company is serious about making the 'fix Windows 11 campaign' work.

item.title: Google Chrome’s Incognito mode doesn't hide your browsing data from your ISP — here's what actually does
item.description: Going "Incognito" won't stop your internet provider from tracking, throttling, and selling your browsing history. Here is exactly how they see what you do online, and the best ways to shut them out.

item.title: HelloFresh Meal Kit Review (2026): Vast Options, Good Execution
item.description: The HelloFresh meal kit has harnessed AI and modern logistics to field the most impressively gigantic menu I have ever seen. Recipe times are still lies, though.

item.title: 93 kg d’aluminium injectés en 0,08 seconde : on a visité l’usine futuriste qui fabrique le nouveau Volvo EX60
item.description: Un SUV 100 % électrique doté de 810 km d'autonomie, vendu au même prix que son équivalent hybride ? C’est l'ambitieux pari du nouveau Volvo EX60. Pour comprendre comment la marque a réussi ce tour de force, nous avons poussé les portes de ses lignes de production en Suède. Au programme : presses titanesques et aluminium en fusion.

item.title: Your iPhone Gets Stolen. Then the Hacking Begins
item.description: A bustling underground ecosystem is providing criminals with the tools to unlock iPhones—and wage phishing attacks against their contacts to access bank accounts and more.

item.title: Nintendo has revealed it has 'decided to change' the release date for its Legend of Zelda live-action movie — but now it's coming out earlier than any of us expected
item.description: The Legend of Zelda's live-action film adaptation is now set to arrive in theaters earlier than anticipated.

item.title: War, drones, and the energy reckoning: How the Iran war is reshaping tech investment
item.description: The Iran war is turning autonomous systems and energy resilience into key investment themes.

item.title: OpenAI replaced GPT-4o, but some users still refuse to let it die — now they’re celebrating its ‘birthday’ in Times Square with a video billboard
item.description: Fans of retired OpenAI model GPT-4o organized a birthday tribute for the chatbot in Times Square, and they still want it back.

item.title: Stuart Fails to Save the Universe gets 'genius' teaser and confirmed release date — but it's the synopsis that near guarantees a full Big Bang Theory reunion
item.description: Unexpected Big Bang Theory spinoff Stuart Fails to Save the Universe has its HBO Max release date and teaser — and a full cast reunion is looking more likely than not.

item.title: One UI 9 beta begins rolling out to Samsung Galaxy S26 users — here are the 5 biggest upgrades to Quick Panel, Notes, and more
item.description: Samsung's One UI 9 beta brings Android 17 to the Galaxy S26 series, complete with improvements to various apps, accessibility tools, and security.

item.title: Kia Vision Meta Turismo : ce concept futuriste est déjà prêt à 90 % pour la série !
item.description: La Kia Vision Meta Turismo a étonné tout le monde par son style spectaculaire. Bonne nouvelle, elle débloquera un modèle de série qui serait déjà « prêt à 90 % » selon la marque coréenne. La Kia Stinger aurait-elle enfin trouvé sa digne descendante ?

item.title: Interface de conversation, application, nouveau design : tout va changer pour Siri avec iOS 27
item.description: Attendu en bêta dès la fin de la WWDC, début juin, iOS 27 devrait faire évoluer drastiquement Siri. L'assistant personnel d'Apple, souvent critiqué, profiterait pour l'occasion d'un tout nouveau design, d'une interface de conversation, et, pour la première fois, d'une application dédiée.

item.title: 'Too many employees are serving as the human middleware between disconnected AI systems': New study claims workers are spending a whole day every week managing AI tools
item.description: Poor AI deployments are causing humans to spend a day a week as 'middleware' – liaising between siloed AI systems.

item.title: Windows Update will soon automatically roll back faulty drivers
item.description: Microsoft is on a mission to fix Windows 11, and part of that involves improving the often-frustrating Windows Update experience. While you'll soon be able to pause updates indefinitely, Microsoft is also adding a new feature that automatically rolls back problematic drivers that have been installed through Windows Update. Microsoft has created a new "Cloud-Initiated […]...

item.title: These Instagram Ads Sure Seem to Be Selling Cocaine Accessories
item.description: From designer straws to magnet-sealed leather pouches, the platform is awash in products seemingly built for coke—despite Meta’s policies on drug paraphernalia.

item.title: iPad Air M4 11″ : première baisse de prix pour cette nouvelle tablette d’Apple taillée pour les étudiants et pros
item.description: L'iPad Air M4 11" est l'un des derniers modèles en date sur le marché, que vous retrouvez en promo sur Amazon à 604,39 euros au lieu de 669 euros.

item.title: 'We meet again, my friend': The Batman Part 2 director reveals the first stars for his DC comic book movie sequel — and 'more' will be confirmed very, very soon
item.description: The Batman 2's first six actors have been revealed, but its biggest surprises are being held back for a later date.

item.title: Identity is the new perimeter: The shift from breaking in to logging in
item.description: Attackers are exploiting identity systems to bypass defenses and gain persistent, stealthy access.

item.title: 10 applications de randonnée​ pour tous les amateurs de sorties en plein air
item.description: Découvrez notre sélection d’applications de randonnée qui répondront aux besoins de tous les amateurs de sorties en pleine nature.

item.title: Voiture électrique : cette « mini centrale » de 10 MW serait la solution pour supprimer l’attente aux bornes
item.description: L’augmentation constante des véhicules électriques en circulation impliquera forcément plus de bornes. Mais un nombre élevé de bornes demande aussi plus d’énergie. ABB pense avoir trouvé la solution pour décupler sans effort la puissance.

item.title: Copernic, Galilée, Darwin... l’IA ressuscite des grands scientifiques en profs de fac dans des vidéos pleines de clins d’œil
item.description: Depuis des années, certains utilisent l’IA générative pour reconstituer l’apparence de personnages de l’Antiquité, en particulier des empereurs romains dont on dispose de plusieurs bustes. Pourquoi ne pas faire de même avec des figures emblématiques des sciences afin de se faire une idée de ce...

item.title: Android : voici les smartphones qui seront compatibles avec AirDrop sur iPhone
item.description: Après avoir annoncé la compatibilité de Quick Share sur Android avec AirDrop sur iPhone, Google a dévoilé la liste des smartphones Android compatibles.

item.title: Meta’s New Reality: Record High Profits. Record Low Morale
item.description: Next week, Meta is cutting about 10 percent of its staff. WIRED spoke with more than a dozen current and former employees about what it's like inside a company where "everyone is unhappy."

item.title: How to watch PGA Championship 2026: Live Streams, TV Channels & Preview
item.description: All the ways to watch The PGA Championship 2026 live streams online from anywhere, as Scottie Scheffler defends his crown as Rory McIlroy leads the challenge.

item.title: You’ve heard about the glass ceiling, but what about the sticky floor? For some working women, it’s an even worse problem
item.description: Here’s what to do about it. For decades, the conversation around gender equality at work has been dominated by one glittering metaphor: the glass ceiling. We count women in boardrooms, track female CEOs, and debate the glass cliff awaiting women promoted during crises. But for millions of women over 45, the problem isn’t getting to the top. It’s getting unstuck from the bottom....

item.title: Googlebook, Android 17, Gemini intelligence : Google vend une grande révolution et je pense qu’ils peuvent y arriver
item.description: Lors de son Android Show, Google a lancé de très grandes promesses, en parlant de l'une des plus grandes mises à jour de l'histoire d'Android. Au-delà de la communication, Google est véritablement le mieux placé pour mener une nouvelle révolution technologique en 2026.

item.title: 50Mbps 5G speeds set to become new normal in the UK as Vodafone intros £21 fixed-line access broadband to millions of customers — but why is it more expensive than Three's very similar £18 offer?
item.description: Vodafone has launched its own 5G Broadband package to plug the gap between copper and full fiber – or as a backup network.

item.title: The answer to the AI-driven hardware crisis isn't more hardware, it's smarter software
item.description: The structural supply crisis is a wake-up call, signaling a broader reset in how enterprise IT should be operated.

item.title: Fancy a slice in the sunshine? These are the best pizza ovens for authentic pies, al fresco style
item.description: Forget BBQs, this summer is all about pizza — and these are the best gas, wood and electric pizza ovens for perfect pies in the sunshine.

item.title: The creative risk of letting AI do all the work
item.description: MIT’s Sinan Aral has the data . . . and a warning. Outsourcing creativity to AI may be the most rational move leaders make, and the most dangerous one. Imagine hiring every all-star on the market, paying top dollar, and then finishing sixth in your division. That’s not a hypothetical. It’s what happened to Sinan Aral’s beloved Liverpool F.C. last season, and it’s also, he argues, an almost perfect metaphor for how most organizations are deploying AI right now....
